content: Currently level 16 and on story Arc 1 Chapter 3-7. I've been following Flares guide for team building and pulls so team comp is not an issue at this time. I'm looking for the quickest way to gain more exp (either paid or free). Thanks in advance for the help 🙂
thread_title: What is the quickest / most proficient way to gain exp and level up?

content:
This is all the stuff you can do to get EXP: 

DAILY QUEST (unlock after completing Story Chapter 1-10):
Every day, after you play 50 cards in any gamemode (or use a Proxy Certificate in Phantasmal Dive), you will get 240 EXP. 

INVENS:
Operation = Story (you will unlock the Hard Difficulty after beating a chapter on Normal):
The first clear of a stage in Normal Difficulty gives 30 EXP;
The first clear of a stage in Hard Difficulty gives 120 EXP.
Task Force Record and The Wandering (unlock after Story chapter 2-9):
For the most part they follow the same rules for difficulty and give the same rewards as the story stages on the first clear (to unlock them, you have to spend Reality Starting Point; you get 1 per day for the Daily Quest). 

INTERLUDE:
Dissolution Ruins (basic material farming that unlock after Story chapter 1-8):
Every stage gives 20 EXP every time you Challenge or Reenact.
Taboo Records (Covenant farming will unlock at LV 35):
Same rules and reward as above.
Phantasmal Dive (unlock after Story chapter 3-2):
Every day you can Challenge the stage and get 240 EXP at completion (higher levels or multiple completions after the first don't give more EXP).
The EXP that you get is shared with the one from Traphase, so you can only get 240 EXP per day (if you get 240 in one, you can't get any in the other).
thread_title: What is the quickest / most proficient way to gain exp and level up?

content:
TRAPHASE (unlock after Story chapter 3-2, the PVP mode):
You get some EXP when you finish a match, but the EXP that you get is shared with the one from Phantasmal Dive, so you can only get 240 EXP per day (if you get 240 in one, you can't get any in the other).

MANUAL (unlock after Story Chapter 1-7):
Mission Report:
Completing the 5 missions gives you 500 EXP and unlocks 5 more (every new set of missions gives 500 EXP more than the last).

ASSIGNMENT (passive farming that you unlock after Story chapter 1-11):
You start with 3 Assignment slots and will unlock more, up to 8, at various LV milestones.
Every Assignment give 30 EXP (and other materials) after 20h.
You can assign up to 4 Characters to every one of them, but to get the Basic Reward the sum of all the levels of them have to be 20 or more, for every 20 over this limit will give bonus rewards depending of the type of Assignment, for some of them the bonus is 3 bonus EXP for every increment.

EVENTS
Completing a Challenge or Reenacting give 120 EXP (not affected by level or stage).
